Articles.Title: 'Overturn this' - Belgium taunt US and say Trump move fired them up
Articles.Summary: Belgium's Nicolas Raskin says Fifa's decision to allow US striker Folarin Balogun to play against them fired them up for the last-16 tie in Seattle.

Articles.Title: MI5 knew agent was misogynist 'obsessed' with violence, watchdog finds
Articles.Summary: A secret inquiry by the security service's watchdog concluded there were 'serious failings in MI5's management of Agent X’.

Articles.Title: Endometriosis diagnosis set to be sped up with two new tests carried out by GPs
Articles.Summary: Experts hope they will be a game-changer and cut the nine-year or longer diagnosis waits patients can currently face.

Articles.Title: Jailers and officials at Russia's 'torture prisons' in Ukraine exposed by BBC
Articles.Summary: Former prisoners accuse the men of abuse in detention centres and want to see them brought to trial.

Articles.Title: Harry begins UK visit as verdict due in privacy case against Daily Mail publisher
Articles.Summary: The Duke of Sussex begins a week of charity engagements and will hear the outcome of his newspaper court battle.

Articles.Title: The Odyssey stars wow red carpet at world premiere in London
Articles.Summary: Anne Hathaway, Zendaya, Tom Holland and Matt Damon were among the stars who walked the carpet in London for the premiere of Christopher Nolan's adaptation of Homer's Ancient Greek epic.

Articles.Title: Explosions injure 18 in Damascus during Macron's visit
Articles.Summary: As reports of the blasts came in, state television said the Syrian president had welcomed Macron at the presidential palace.

Articles.Title: Zelensky to press Nato for air defence systems after intense Russian strikes
Articles.Summary: The Ukrainian president will use the Nato meeting in Turkey to argue he needs more interceptor missiles.

Articles.Title: Women hit fertility tipping point at 49 - even with young donor eggs
Articles.Summary: Age-related changes in the womb lining may be the cause and could be treatable in the future, say experts.

Articles.Title: E-bike injury payouts top £110m and push up insurance premiums
Articles.Summary: It is only seven years since the first claim over an injury from a micromobility vehicle was made.

Articles.Title: Marine Le Pen appeal verdict: Why today's ruling matters for France
Articles.Summary: The leader of France's National Rally leads the opinion polls ahead of the 2027 presidential election and will now find out if she can stand.

Articles.Title: The US World Cup dream ends in shambolic fashion - did red card saga play a part?
Articles.Summary: Mauricio Pochettino says he feels "disappointed with too many people" who brought "politics and manipulation" into the game as the US exit World Cup.

Articles.Title: Watch: Belgium make light work of US to set up quarter-final tie with Spain
Articles.Summary: Belgium ease past a defensively sloppy USA in a match shrouded in controversy surrounding Folarin Balogun's delayed suspension, a scandal that made little impact on the pitch.

Articles.Title: Ronaldo's World Cup career ends in tears after his sixth and final attempt to lift trophy
Articles.Summary: BBC Sport looks at the end of Cristiano Ronaldo's World Cup career as he fails to win football's biggest prize.

Articles.Title: Fans react to US loss after red card drama
Articles.Summary: The BBC's Nada Tawfik spoke to US fans after the FIFA World Cup co-hosts were knocked out of the tournament.

Articles.Title: Watch: Spain into quarter-finals after Merino's late winner against Portugal
Articles.Summary: Spain leave it late as super-sub Mikel Merino scores a stoppage-time winner to send his side into the quarter-finals, ending Cristiano Ronaldo's hopes of World Cup glory.

Articles.Title: 'I wear it on my middle finger': The rise of the defiant divorce ring
Articles.Summary: Around the world women are marking their split with new - or repurposed engagement - rings.

Articles.Title: Resistance and revenge - Iran wanted to send a message with its farewell to Khamenei
Articles.Summary: Three days of public mourning in Tehran was a political spectacle Iran's leaders wanted the world to see, writes the BBC's international correspondent Lyse Doucet.

Articles.Title: Meet Arthur Fery, the wildcard lifting the gloom around British players at Wimbledon
Articles.Summary: Seven days ago, there was doom and gloom around British players' performances at this year's Wimbledon. Then Arthur Fery stepped forward.

Articles.Title: Can China repeat its EV success with robotaxis?
Articles.Summary: China's self-driving car firms have been given a headstart by the country's EV supply chain as they expand globally.

Articles.Title: Why some African nations are turning down Trump aid money
Articles.Summary: The Trump administration sees the aid as more transactional - but some say it is not a fair trade.

Articles.Title: Erika Kirk comes face-to-face in court with husband's alleged killer
Articles.Summary: Charlie Kirk's widow was joined by the late US activist's family - all of whom attended court for the first time in the case.

Articles.Title: Comparing student loans to phone contracts 'amounted to mis-selling', MPs say
Articles.Summary: A new report says students were not well-enough informed that their loan terms could change retrospectively.

Articles.Title: Top Democrats press Maine senate candidate to drop out of race over sexual assault allegation
Articles.Summary: Graham Platner denied the allegation, calling it "categorically false" but said he was "taking the time to reflect on the best path forward" in the race.

Articles.Title: Watch: Moment rare tornado lashes central Chinese cities
Articles.Summary: Videos shared with the BBC show debris flying through the air as the storm swept through Ezhou and Huanggang in Hubei province.

Articles.Title: Banks accused of pushing customers away from basic accounts
Articles.Summary: Some of the UK's biggest banks have been failing their most vulnerable customers, according to the financial regulator.

Articles.Title: Amazon bars breastfeeding boss from business course
Articles.Summary: Rachael Bews says she told on the way her child would not be allowed on site. Amazon has apologised for not communicating its policy clearly.

Articles.Title: Party Rock Anthem singer Lauren Bennett dies aged 37
Articles.Summary: Bennett's cause of death was not immediately clear and bandmates from her former group G.R.L say their "hearts are broken".

Articles.Summary: Top stories, breaking news, live reporting, and follow news topics that match your interests

Articles.Title: Is Trump interfering in the World Cup?
Articles.Summary: Trump spoke to Fifa president about controversial red card for USA player.

Articles.Title: After 250 years, do US citizens still believe in the American Dream?
Articles.Summary: Historian Heather Cox Richardson on what history tells us about modern America

Articles.Summary: Jelena Ostapenko and Marcelo Arevalo advance to the Wimbledon mixed doubles semi-finals in straight sets, but the victory is marred by a fiery post-match argument.

Articles.Title: Why European backlash over Trump intervention won't worry Infantino
Articles.Summary: After 10 years as Fifa president, could the Folarin Balogun controversy tip the balance against Gianni Infantino? Don't bet on it.
